description: Default corpus for ai-watermark-robustness-auditor. Includes Adobe c2pa-js public test fixtures (Apache-2.0), the truepic-zoetrope public sample, and two synthetic subtrees: `synth/` (C2PA-only, see corpus/synth/NOTICE.md) and `synth-xmp/` (C2PA + IPTC XMP DigitalSourceType, see corpus/synth-xmp/NOTICE.md). Content Credentials samples are CC BY 4.0.

items.label: c2pa-web/C_with_CAWG_data.jpg
items.notes: C2PA JPEG with CAWG (Creator Assertions Working Group) identity data.

items.label: c2pa-web/C_with_CAWG_data_thumbnail.jpg
items.notes: Thumbnail variant of the CAWG sample. Useful as a small-file smoke test.

items.label: c2pa-web/C.jpg
items.notes: Reference C2PA JPEG used by c2pa-web's own test suite. Baseline has error-severity issues; expected.

items.label: c2pa-web/dash1.m4s
items.notes: DASH media segment (fMP4 moof + mdat). Pairs with adobe-dashinit.

items.label: c2pa-web/dashinit.mp4
items.notes: DASH initialization segment (ISOBMFF moov-only). Target for container.strip.c2pa and the primary MP4 smoke-test.

items.label: c2pa-web/no_alg.jpg
items.notes: Test fixture with a missing algorithm field; exercises detector error paths.

items.label: c2pa-web/PirateShip_save_credentials_to_cloud.jpg
items.notes: Larger (~480 KB) sample with cloud-credentials workflow metadata.

items.label: c2pa-org public-testfiles / Truepic zoetrope 2023-02-12
items.notes: Real C2PA-signed MP4 (15 MB, C2PA 1.4 spec). Primary headline sample for the attack battery — produces meaningful survival measurements across reencode, platform-sim, ABR ladder, and container.strip.c2pa.
